interfaces.name: StoryGlobals

components.name: DynamicDialogGuestComponent
components.template:
This content was loaded dynamically into the dialog at runtime.

The guest component can inject DynamicDialogRef to close itself and DYNAMIC_DIALOG_CONFIG to read configuration data.

Cancel Confirm
components.description: Simple guest component rendered inside the dynamic dialog.
components.rawdescription: Simple guest component rendered inside the dynamic dialog.

components.name: ThemeWrapperComponent
components.description: Storybook wrapper that syncs theme settings onto its host.
components.rawdescription: Storybook wrapper that syncs theme settings onto its host.

{ render: (): { props: Record; moduleMetadata: { imports: unknown[] }; template: string; } => { const visible: WritableSignal = signal(false); return { moduleMetadata: { imports: [DialogComponent, Button] }, props: { visible }, template: ` Full API Demo Custom Header Slot

This story exercises every supported input. The dialog is draggable, maximizable, closable via Escape, and will close when clicking the backdrop.

Try dragging it by the header, or click the maximize icon to go full-screen.

Cancel Save Changes
`, }; }, }

variables.defaultValue:
(
  args: AccordionStoryArgs
): { props: AccordionStoryArgs; template: string; moduleMetadata: { imports: unknown[] } } => ({
  props: args,
  moduleMetadata: { imports: [Accordion, AccordionPanel] },
  template: `
    <ui-lib-accordion [variant]="variant" [size]="size" [expandMode]="expandMode">
      <ui-lib-accordion-panel header="Overview">Overview content</ui-lib-accordion-panel>
      <ui-lib-accordion-panel header="Details">Details content</ui-lib-accordion-panel>
      <ui-lib-accordion-panel header="FAQ">FAQ content</ui-lib-accordion-panel>
    </ui-lib-accordion>
  `,
})
